programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Alexis and Johnny come up with a plan to impress a motel reviewer; David and Patrick look for an apartment.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny finds himself under financial pressure with the arrival of Moira's high-priced red carpet gown for the Crows movie premiere; David is conned into taking a road trip with Stevie.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Ted finally lets loose at David and Patrick's housewarming party; Johnny and Moira baby-sit Roland Jr.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Moira and the Jazzagals take Jocelyn to the casino; Johnny has a conversation with Stevie about intimacy in the workplace.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny believes Ted's mom is attracted to him; Moira gets involved in a local musical production.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny and Stevie attend the hospitality awards; Moira tries to stop Alexis from auditioning for Cabaret.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny prepares himself after finding a positive pregnancy test; David and Patrick search for privacy.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Moira prepares for her headline debut at the Asbestos Fest; David deals with some loitering teens in the apothecary.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Alexis and Twyla go out for a girls' night; David gets a lesson on compromise.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: A rumour that Moira died appears online; Roland asks Johnny to be the godfather of his child.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: David and Patrick host an open mic night; Johnny and Stevie start rebranding the hotel.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: The Roses plan a barbecue; David confronts his comfort level with Patrick; Alexis investigates a mysterious text.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: David and Stevie set out on a romantic getaway; Johnny steps in at a Jazzagals rehearsal and wows everyone with his skills; Alexis tests out a dating app.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: David looks for a way to reconcile with Patrick after spending time away from him; Moira pitches the idea of a singles week event.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny and Moira get too involved at a singles event; Alexis runs into an old friend.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Moira tries to get out of jury duty; David runs damage control for a Rose Apothecary product.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Singles Week kicks off just as Jocelyn's baby is born; Patrick and David take their relationship to the next level.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny wants to celebrate the holidays with an old-fashioned Rose Family Christmas Party, but it takes a lot to get everyone on board at the last minute; Moira brings a negative attitude to Christmas tree shopping.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Moira films a movie in Bosnia, hoping to revive her career; David tries to take his relationship to the next level.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Moira loses sleep stressing over old love letters; David and Stevie get held up at the store.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Alexis and Johnny come up with a plan to impress a motel reviewer; David and Patrick look for an apartment.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny finds himself under financial pressure with the arrival of Moira's high-priced red carpet gown for the Crows movie premiere; David is conned into taking a road trip with Stevie.

programme.desc: Ted finally lets loose at David and Patrick's housewarming party; Johnny and Moira baby-sit Roland Jr.

programme.desc: Moira and the Jazzagals take Jocelyn to the casino; Johnny has a conversation with Stevie about intimacy in the workplace.

programme.desc: Johnny believes Ted's mom is attracted to him; Moira gets involved in a local musical production.

programme.desc: Johnny and Stevie attend the hospitality awards; Moira tries to stop Alexis from auditioning for Cabaret.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny prepares himself after finding a positive pregnancy test; David and Patrick search for privacy.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Moira prepares for her headline debut at the Asbestos Fest; David deals with some loitering teens in the apothecary.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Alexis and Twyla go out for a girls' night; David gets a lesson on compromise.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: A rumour that Moira died appears online; Roland asks Johnny to be the godfather of his child.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: David and Patrick host an open mic night; Johnny and Stevie start rebranding the hotel.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: The Roses plan a barbecue; David confronts his comfort level with Patrick; Alexis investigates a mysterious text.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: David and Stevie set out on a romantic getaway; Johnny steps in at a Jazzagals rehearsal and wows everyone with his skills; Alexis tests out a dating app.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: David looks for a way to reconcile with Patrick after spending time away from him; Moira pitches the idea of a singles week event.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: David agrees to play in the annual baseball game; Moira's rehearsal pushes Stevie over the edge.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny and Moira accidentally hit a cat; David has a run-in with an old colleague who has a business very similar to Rose Apothecary.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: While in town for the surprise party, Patrick's parents get a surprise of their own; Moira gets coaxed into going to a soap opera convention with Alexis.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny fills in at the annual mayor's roast; David tries to stop Moira from finding out about Stevie and Patrick's dance lessons.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Patrick and David go on a romantic hike; everyone panics over Johnny's health scare.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Stevie is nowhere to be found on opening night for Cabaret; David attempts to make a big announcement.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: David scouts a potential wedding venue, while Johnny and Moira have a romantic picnic by the creek.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: David is embarrassed by a childhood issue that resurfaces, and only spirals further when Patrick is so understanding; Johnny, Stevie and Roland attend a viewing for a nearby motel; Alexis helps Moira join social media.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny and Moira endeavor to secure an investor for a new motel while, Alexis and Ted struggle with long distance.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Moira shares the newly released "Crows" movie trailer with the Jazzagals; Johnny and Roland find a suspicious bag of money at the new motel.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Alexis plans a local premiere for the "Crows" movie, and Moira makes a big splash on the red carpet; David tends to Patrick after his wisdom teeth removal.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Alexis and Moira deal with the aftermath of a viral video, while Johnny helps Bob get back out in the dating world.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Moira and David sample wine at Herb Ertlinger's vineyard, while Johnny attempts to have "the talk" with Patrick.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny and Moira spend a night at the presidential suite in the new motel, while Alexis receives a surprise visitor.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny becomes overly involved in Alexis' romantic life, while Moira offends the townspeople in an interview with People Magazine.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Moira's former "Sunrise Bay" producers show up with big news while Alexis binge-watches old episodes of the soap.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: The Roses attend the "Escape Room" portion of David and Patrick's Bachelor Party, but their participation wanes the more their personal dilemmas come to a head.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny, Stevie and Roland head to New York for their pitch meeting, and the family anxiously awaits their return.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Moira receives some unexpected news, and David makes a tough decision about where he wants to live.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: David stresses out over the rain on his wedding day, but his family makes it right.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: David agrees to play in the annual baseball game; Moira's rehearsal pushes Stevie over the edge.

programme.desc: Johnny and Moira accidentally hit a cat; David has a run-in with an old colleague who has a business very similar to Rose Apothecary.
